prompts.title: Faceless YouTube AI channel planner
prompts.prompt: Act as a YouTube strategist. Create 20 faceless video ideas about AI for [audience], with hooks, titles, thumbnails, retention beats and monetization angle.
prompts.description: Turns AI news into a monetizable content plan.

prompts.title: AI workflow automation builder
prompts.prompt: Map a full AI automation for [business process]. Include triggers, tools, database fields, failure handling, approval steps and cost controls.
prompts.description: Useful for building real client automations.

prompts.title: AI side hustle validator
prompts.prompt: Evaluate this AI business idea: [idea]. Score demand, difficulty, competition, tools needed, pricing, first offer and 7-day validation plan.

prompts.title: GitHub repo explainer
prompts.prompt: Explain this GitHub repository for a beginner: [repo URL or README]. Cover what it does, who should use it, installation difficulty, use cases, risks and one project idea.
prompts.description: Turns technical repos into plain-language explanations.

prompts.title: AI agent designer
prompts.prompt: Design an AI agent for [task]. Define goal, tools, memory, inputs, outputs, approval steps, failure handling and a test checklist.

prompts.title: RAG app builder
prompts.prompt: Create a full RAG app plan for [document type]. Include data ingestion, chunking, embeddings, retrieval, UI, auth, costs and deployment steps.
prompts.description: Useful for document chat and knowledge-base apps.

prompts.title: AI learning roadmap
prompts.prompt: Build a 30-day learning roadmap for [skill level] to learn practical AI. Include daily tasks, free resources, projects and portfolio outcomes.
prompts.description: Guides beginners into practical AI skills.

prompts.title: AI publishing content plan
prompts.prompt: Create an trustworthy content strategy for [niche]. Include high-intent topics, article clusters, internal links, legal pages, reader experience and quality rules.
prompts.description: Plans informational websites built for organic traffic.

prompts.title: AI tool comparison
prompts.prompt: Compare these AI tools: [tools]. Evaluate pricing, best use case, limitations, ideal user, workflow fit and final recommendation.
prompts.description: Creates useful comparison content for readers.

prompts.title: Client automation offer
prompts.prompt: Create a paid AI automation offer for [business type]. Include pain points, deliverables, pricing tiers, onboarding questions and demo workflow.
prompts.description: Helps package AI services for clients.

ideas.title: Prompt pack store for one profession
ideas.description: Create prompt packs for lawyers, realtors, fitness coaches or creators, with examples and templates.
ideas.monetization: Digital product sales, bundles and newsletter upsells.

ideas.title: AI agent templates marketplace
ideas.description: Publish ready-to-use agent workflows for research, sales follow-up, content repurposing and customer support.
ideas.monetization: Paid templates, subscriptions and implementation services.

ideas.title: Micro SaaS for AI summaries
ideas.description: Build a simple product that summarizes calls, PDFs or niche documents for a specific market.

ideas.title: AI opportunity newsletter
ideas.description: Curate new AI tools, GitHub repos, prompts and automation ideas for one specific audience.
ideas.monetization: Sponsorships, premium briefs and premium research briefs.

ideas.title: GitHub repo tutorial hub
ideas.description: Explain trending AI repos with simple setup guides, examples and use cases.

ideas.title: AI template library
ideas.description: Sell reusable prompt packs, automation templates and workflow docs for creators and small businesses.

ideas.title: Local AI workshops
ideas.description: Teach local businesses how to use AI for customer support, content, reporting and sales follow-up.

ideas.title: AI niche job board
ideas.description: Create a focused job board for AI automation, prompt engineering, model ops or AI content roles.
ideas.monetization: Paid listings, featured companies and newsletter sponsorship.

ideas.title: AI calculators and free tools
ideas.description: Build small calculators for token cost, automation ROI, model comparison or prompt quality scoring.
ideas.monetization: Partnerships, lead capture and paid upgrades.

ideas.title: AI content repurposing service
ideas.description: Turn podcasts, videos and webinars into clips, posts, newsletters and articles.
